eng.definition: the top or highest part of something, especially one forming a point.
examples: The climber reached the apex of the mountain.
The apex of his career was when he became the CEO.
The apex predator in the ecosystem is the lion.

hin.definition: A detailed examination of the elements or structure of something
examples: मैंने उस किताब का विश्लेषण किया.
विश्लेषण से हमें महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी मिल सकती है.
